scope: Historical B0/C1 generation replay design audit for the A-to-Z pipeline runner. This audit documents replay readiness only and does not run graph construction.

summary.level1_packaging_status: B0/C1 frozen candidate packaging is safe today through construct-candidates --from-frozen
summary.first_level2_implementation_boundary: Phase I read-only/run-scoped replay: materialize allocation and genericity matrix exports under outputs/pipeline_runs/<run_id>/phase1_replay/, then compare to frozen canonical artifacts without overwriting them.

classification_legend.safe_replay_now: Can be enabled as a read-only or run-scoped replay step with current code and no historical artifact writes.
classification_legend.needs_read_only_wrapper: Needs a wrapper that validates or writes only run-scoped comparison outputs before it can be enabled.
classification_legend.needs_run_directory_wrapper: Needs a wrapper that translates historical commands into fresh run directories and prevents writes to historical paths.
classification_legend.needs_slurm_wrapper: Needs job submission, dependency, status, and run directory tracking before replay is safe.
classification_legend.driftable_not_replayable: Current implementation can depend on live sources or driftable behavior and must remain frozen-only until redesigned.
classification_legend.historical_only_do_not_rerun: Should remain evidence only; no stage in this audit requires this strongest classification once wrappers are built, but some are frozen-only for now.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: none for validation; use a future run-scoped export wrapper only if materialized evidence tables are needed
evidence: scripts/reconstruction/check_phase1_dashboard_extraction.py validates frozen Phase I counts without Streamlit, WDQS, or LLM calls
stage_assessments.notes: This is not a materializing replay of dashboard exports; it is a deterministic check over frozen Phase I inputs.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: write regenerated allocation to outputs/pipeline_runs/<run_id>/phase1_replay/ and compare to canonical hash a0bb00a1e9b1e624c2ff6ee8fb215456b017b3aca679ef231f749ea796c310bb; never overwrite src/Pruning graph/bidirectional_allocation_results5k.json
stage_assessments.notes: The extracted Phase I modules make this plausible, but the manifest output is the canonical allocation artifact and must remain frozen.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: write regenerated genericity matrix to outputs/pipeline_runs/<run_id>/phase1_replay/ and compare relation set/content against the frozen canonical matrix; never overwrite archive input matrix
stage_assessments.notes: Current manifest input and output are the same historical path, so direct replay is unsafe.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: correct the command to the historical subcommand score-genericity with --config and a fresh --run-dir under outputs/pipeline_runs/<run_id>/level2_replay/; verify inputs and compare output summaries to frozen historical evidence
evidence: ensure_stage_can_write_once guards stage outputs inside a run directory
stage_assessments.notes: The manifest command is not the actual CLI shape; a wrapper must translate manifest stage IDs to historical subcommands.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: copy or reference frozen Stage2 candidate shards into a fresh run directory, call audit-candidates with --config/--run-dir, and write only run-scoped Stage3 outputs
evidence: Stage2 candidate collection is WDQS-backed and outside safe Level 2 replay
stage_assessments.notes: Stage3 itself is local over frozen shards, but it assumes a run directory layout.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: fresh run directory wrapper with frozen Stage2/Stage3 inputs, explicit no-live policy, and output hash/report comparison; never target prod_refine_20260315_180520
evidence: configs/pipeline/kg_pipeline.default.json marks graph construction stages never_by_default
stage_assessments.notes: This is graph generation and should remain disabled until wrapper isolation and validation are in place.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: fresh run directory wrapper that consumes run-scoped Stage4 output and frozen candidate shards; compare repair summary to historical evidence
stage_assessments.notes: Safe replay depends on a fully run-scoped upstream graph construction replay.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: fresh run directory wrapper and manifest correction: historical code writes stage06_refine_graph, while the current manifest names stage06_refinement
stage_assessments.notes: There is a manifest/code stage-name mismatch that must be resolved before replay orchestration.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: call eta_aware_component_filter.py with explicit --run_dir pointing at a fresh replay run and explicit --out_dir under outputs/pipeline_runs/<run_id>/level2_replay/; do not use --force except inside disposable run dirs
stage_assessments.notes: This script is closer to wrapper-ready than Stage11/12 because it already supports explicit output directories and does not need live WDQS.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: run-specific output_dir wrapper plus an audited frozen-local candidate source mode that prevents WDQS queries; record manifest/state/events and compare output hash to 73bc624bf9147b0bba4962ab286648bcfeeb931a94a1d1a727839f160b35ada5
evidence: src/kg_building/repair_kg_connectivity.py defines SPARQL_ENDPOINT and WDQS query helpers
repair_kg_connectivity.py requires --output_dir and manages run manifest/state/events
artifact bundle manifest treats Stage11 graph_output.jsonl as external frozen evidence
stage_assessments.notes: The existing script can write to a fresh output_dir, but its candidate acquisition can be live and driftable; that blocks safe replay today.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: same as Stage11: fresh output_dir, no-live frozen-local candidate policy, strict input hash check on Stage11 output, and output comparison to 89ec9bf9c8932962fd3d966073b51f76345666eda5ed5d9beb18659d02e294b0
evidence: artifact bundle manifest treats Stage12 graph_output.jsonl as external frozen evidence
stage_assessments.notes: Stage12 is downstream of Stage11 and shares the same live-query and historical-output risks.

stage_assessments.output_path_scope: historical_global_graph_artifact_in_manifest; actual script writes rebuild audit reports
stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: separate validation from extraction: keep 01_audit_B0_final_graph.sh as frozen audit, and if extraction is needed create a run-scoped largest-component extractor that writes under outputs/pipeline_runs/<run_id>/ and compares hash c443b124dd727976ca9c082dc91f1b8bb66d82ff117b05a926bc6ad21a5fe4b9
evidence: scripts/reconstruction/01_audit_B0_final_graph.sh performs B0 re-audit and writes rebuild report/summary with overwrite checks
configs/pipeline/kg_pipeline.default.json labels this as largest-component extraction but command points to audit wrapper
stage_assessments.notes: The manifest stage label and command semantics are not aligned; today this is an audit, not a safe extraction replay.

stage_assessments.required_wrapper_before_enabling: SLURM-aware wrapper with run-specific SWEEP_DIR under outputs/pipeline_runs/<run_id>/, submitted job IDs, dependency tracking, resume/status support, and no writes into historical graph directories by default
evidence: scripts/run_stage13_branch_sweep.sh submits sbatch jobs and writes SWEEP_DIR under the Stage12 graph tree by default
stage_assessments.notes: C1 can be packaged in Level 1 from frozen artifacts, but replaying its pruning branch is not safe in the current runner.

deterministic_replay_stages_enabled_safe: phase1_symmetry_inverse_evidence can be enabled immediately as a read-only golden-master validation.

phase1_allocation_export and phase1_support_genericity_matrix_export are the first materialized replay targets, but only after wrappers write under outputs/pipeline_runs/<run_id>/phase1_replay/ and compare to frozen canonical artifacts.
graph_construction_stages_dangerous_due_: phase2_B0_largest_component_extraction if implemented as actual extraction
stages_that_must_remain_frozen_only_for_: phase2_stage4_core_graph_construction through phase2_stage7_eta_aware_replacement until run-scoped graph-construction wrappers exist
required_answers.first_level2_implementation_boundary: Phase I read-only/run-scoped replay: materialize allocation and genericity matrix exports under outputs/pipeline_runs/<run_id>/phase1_replay/, then compare to frozen canonical artifacts without overwriting them.

implementation_sequence: Add a Phase I replay/export wrapper that writes allocation and genericity matrix artifacts under the pipeline run directory and compares them to canonical hashes/sets.
Correct manifest-to-historical-command translation for relation_balanced_kg_pipeline.py subcommands and create a dry-run/read-only validation wrapper for Stage1 and Stage3 layouts.
Only then add run-scoped wrappers for Stage4 through Stage7 graph construction, with output hash/report comparison and no writes to historical run directories.
Treat Stage11 and Stage12 separately because repair_kg_connectivity.py can query WDQS; require an audited frozen-local source mode before enabling.
Treat C1 Stage13 separately because it requires SLURM job-state tracking and run-scoped sweep directories.
